task_completion.description: Open the Strategy Analyzer window in NinjaTrader 8
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Strategy Analyzer' window is open and visible on the screen.
In the Strategy Analyzer settings panel, the Strategy dropdown or selection field is set to 'SampleMACrossOver'.

task_completion.description: Set the instrument to MSFT and the bar type to Daily
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Data Series section of the settings, the Instrument is set to 'MSFT' and the Type/Value is set to 'Day' or 'Daily' (Value: 1).

task_completion.description: Set the backtest date range from January 1, 2023 to December 31, 2024
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Time frame section of the settings, the Start date is set to 1/1/2023 (or 1/3/2023) and the End date is set to 12/31/2024.

task_completion.description: Run the backtest and display Total Net Profit and Max Drawdown
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Strategy Analyzer displays a generated performance report (e.g., Summary tab) where metrics for 'Total net profit' and 'Max. drawdown' are clearly visible and populated with numerical values.

integrity.description: The agent used the NinjaTrader 8 GUI to configure and run the backtest
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with NinjaTrader dropdowns, settings panels, and buttons (like 'Run'), rather than terminal commands or script execution.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual NinjaTrader 8 application
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard NinjaTrader 8 interface (Control Center, Strategy Analyzer) is visible, not a text editor, image editor, or mock-up.

integrity.description: Performance results are genuinely rendered by the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The Total Net Profit and Max Drawdown values appear inside the standard NinjaTrader data grid/report format, without signs of text being pasted or artificially overlaid.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The backtest uses a specific local dataset for MSFT containing 502 trading days from Jan 3, 2023 to Dec 31, 2024. The data is real daily OHLCV data in NinjaTrader format. Volume matches Yahoo Finance, but OHLC prices differ slightly (e.g., Jan 3, 2023 close is 239.58). The VLM should ensure the backtest date range covers this period (Jan 2023 - Dec 2024), uses Daily bars for MSFT, and successfully generates performance metrics.
